_comment: Copy this file to tools/google-sheets-config.json (gitignored) and fill in the values. See agents/sales/AGENT.md > 'Google Sheets via service account' for the full setup walkthrough.
_sheet_id_hint: From a URL like https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/SHEET_ID/edit#gid=0 — paste only the SHEET_ID portion.
_credentials_path_hint: Relative to repo root. The JSON key file you downloaded from Google Cloud Console -> IAM -> Service Accounts -> your account -> Keys -> Add key -> JSON.
_share_hint: Open the credentials JSON, copy the 'client_email' value (looks like gtm-agent-sheets@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com), then share the Google Sheet with that email as Editor.
